systemLabel: Linux base system attached · systemd · wayland · online
walletLabel: Wallet bridge pending · ownership surface visible
runtimeSource: Rust runtime-core mediates between Linux host services and the SolOS operating layer.
runtimeRole: Intermediary layer between Linux base system and SolOS operating layer
mediationStatus: Host facts detected and normalized into SolOS-facing runtime state

home.summaryTitle: Ghost now has a first layered intelligence module
home.summarySubtitle: data + results = algorithms, grounded in host runtime and optional Brave web search.
home.summaryBody: This build gives Ghost a first perceptron-like pipeline with stacked stages: runtime data ingestion, result synthesis, and algorithmic next-action output. Host state comes from Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS, kernel 7.0.0, hostname lcpby-HP-ENVY-TS-17-Notebook-PC, user lcpby, uptime 5d 16h 36m. Web grounding currently reports: Ghost found 3 web references about layered agent design, web search grounding, and approval-aware orchestration..
home.nextActionSubtitle: Promote Ghost from research pipeline to task executor
home.nextActionBody: The next module should add task intents and tool actions so Ghost can turn researched guidance into explicit SolOS commands, approval requests, and user-visible outcomes.

ghost.thesisLabel: Ghost should become a native orchestration layer that combines local runtime reality, web research, and explicit approvals into useful operating behavior.
ghost.intelligenceSummary: Perceptron-like layered pipeline: input data, synthesized results, then action-shaping algorithms.
ghost.onboardingBody: Ghost already has a repository-local Brave key configured for this SolOS checkout.

pipelineStages.name: data
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost reads host runtime facts from Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS on lcpby-HP-ENVY-TS-17-Notebook-PC, session wayland, uptime 5d 16h 36m, network online.

pipelineStages.name: results
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost converts raw runtime and web evidence into structured results. Source: file:../../config/ghost.json.

pipelineStages.name: algorithms
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost applies a layered decision pipeline: ingest data, score relevance, summarize useful paths, and expose next actions inside SolOS.

lastResearch.query: how to design a layered local AI agent with web search and approval flow for operating system shell
lastResearch.summary: Ghost found 3 web references about layered agent design, web search grounding, and approval-aware orchestration.

citations.title: Building AI Coding Agents for the Terminal: Scaffolding, Harness, Context Engineering, and Lessons Learned
citations.snippet: Figure 2 illustrates the architecture of OpenDev across four principal layers: Entry & UI, Agent, Tool & Context, and Persistence. A user query flows through this pipeline sequentially, from the entry point through agent reasoning and tool execution, before results are persisted and rendered. The CLI Entry Point parses arguments and bootstraps four shared managers (ConfigManager, SessionManager, ModeManager, and ApprovalManager), which are injected into all downstream components.

citations.title: Build a More Secure, Always-On Local AI Agent with OpenClaw and NVIDIA NemoClaw | NVIDIA Technical Blog
citations.snippet: Key security features include network and filesystem isolation managed by OpenShell, real-time policy approval for external access, and full local inference to ensure that no data leaves the device during agent operation. AI-generated content may summarize information incompletely. Verify important information. Learn more · Agents are evolving from question-and-answer systems into long-running autonomous assistants that read files, call APIs, and drive multi-step workflows.

citations.title: Build an OpenClaw Free (Secure), Always-On Local AI Agent | flyingpenguin
citations.snippet: Each channel is a separate process with its own Ed25519 identity. The vault runs out of process. Inference stays on loopback because the agent is on the host. Shell exec runs in a hardened container configured at the tool layer, rather than trying to wrap around the whole agent.

approvals.title: Bind Ghost web research to the user's own Brave key
approvals.description: Ghost should open Brave's API key page for the SolOS user, let them pay or subscribe on their own account, then return and configure a repo-local key instead of sharing the developer key.
approvals.scope: ghost onboarding -> Brave key acquisition -> solos/config/ghost.json

approvals.title: Connect Ghost conclusions to executable tasks
approvals.description: Prepare the next module so Ghost can transform ranked conclusions into app launches, commands, and approval requests inside SolOS.
